titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Clifton Mines photographs and miscellany, 1864-1969

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Clifton Mines Photographs And Miscellany,1864-1969
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Photographs, clippings and magazine articles, typescripts of newspaper articles, and financial documents.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Photographs, clippings and magazine articles, and typescripts of newspaper articles ca.1867-ca.1941 concerning the Clifton Iron Co., St. Lawrence County, New York. Also, certificates of increase of capital stock, 1864, 1868; consent to mortgage, 1866; and typescripts of the certificate of incorporation and financial documents.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Clifton Mines was located in Clifton, St. Lawrence Co., New York. The company and the railroad it owned operated for only a few years, 1864-1870. The ore bed was later bought (1942) and mining operations revived in 1944 by the M.A. Hanna Co.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs, clippings and magazine articles, and typescripts of newspaper articles ca.1867-ca.1941 concerning the Clifton Iron Co., St. Lawrence County, New York. Also, certificates of increase of capital stock, 1864, 1868; consent to mortgage, 1866; and typescripts of the certificate of incorporation and financial documents.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Clifton Mines photographs and miscellany, #3458. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
